title: Mount Hoffman and Lake Tenaya — Preview (scenes 1-5 of 137)

scenes.day: July 26 — summit of Mount Hoffman, Yosemite
scenes.image: A solitary 19th-century naturalist with beard and wide-brim hat cresting a granite ridge of Mount Hoffman in Yosemite at sunrise, vast Sierra Nevada peaks of the Yosemite high country spreading below, golden light catching distant snow
scenes.motion: very slow upward dolly revealing the panorama as the figure ascends

beats.text: July twenty-sixth. Ramble to the summit of Mount Hoffman, eleven thousand feet high—
the highest point in life's journey my feet have yet touched.

scenes.day: July 26 — summit of Mount Hoffman, Yosemite (continued)
scenes.image: A solitary 19th-century naturalist with beard and wide-brim hat cresting a granite ridge of Mount Hoffman in Yosemite at sunrise, vast Sierra Nevada peaks of the Yosemite high country spreading below, golden light catching distant snow
scenes.motion: continued slow upward camera movement, the figure now near the crest with the full Yosemite panorama visible

beats.text: And what glorious landscapes are about me—new plants, new animals, new crystals,

scenes.day: July 26 — summit panorama, Yosemite high country
scenes.image: Sweeping painterly panorama of receding snowy Sierra Nevada peaks rising in successive planes across the Yosemite high country, atmospheric perspective in dusty blues and purples, foreground granite slope of Mount Hoffman
scenes.motion: very slow horizontal pan across the range from left to right, light shifting on distant peaks

beats.text: and multitudes of new mountains far higher than Hoffman, towering in glorious array
along the axis of the range—serene, majestic, snow-laden, sun-drenched.

scenes.image: Yosemite-distinctive granite domes catching golden afternoon light, dark Sierra evergreen forests in valleys below, scattered alpine high-country lakes glinting like mirrors, view from a Sierra Nevada ridge
scenes.motion: very slow aerial drift forward over the granite domes, light shifting across rock

beats.text: Vast domes and ridges shining below them—forests, lakes, and meadows in the hollows,
the pure blue bell-flower sky brooding them all.

scenes.image: Stylized Sierra Nevada mountain peak with a single dramatic shaft of light piercing through painterly Studio Ghibli clouds, ethereal and inviting, vintage children's book style, Yosemite high country setting
scenes.motion: very slow forward push-in toward the peak, light ray and clouds remain in frame throughout

beats.text: A glory day of admission into a new realm of wonders,
as if Nature had wooingly whispered, 'Come higher.'

scenes.day: July 26 — Muir's journal at the summit
scenes.image: An open journal on a flat granite slab on Mount Hoffman in Yosemite, with pencil sketches of Sierra alpine plants and crystals, Sierra alpine wildflowers around it, hands sketching at the edge of the page
scenes.motion: slow downward tilt over the journal page, hand sketching visible at the bottom of frame

beats.text: What questions I asked, and how little I know of all the vast show,
and how eagerly, tremulously hopeful of some day knowing more, learning the meaning of these divine symbols crowded together on this wondrous page.
